description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Upgrade the application to .NET 10 (net10.0), the latest Long-Term Support release.
tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to .NET 10. Upgrading ensures the application runs on the latest LTS runtime with improved performance, security patches, and long-term support.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade all project target frameworks to net10.0. Update project files, global.json (if present), and any CI/CD pipeline configuration to use .NET 10. Ensure the project builds successfully and all existing unit tests pass after the upgrade.

tasks.description: Scan all project dependencies for known CVEs and remediate any identified vulnerabilities.
tasks.reason: Security remediation is required in every modernization plan to ensure the application is free of known vulnerabilities before deployment.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade vulnerable dependencies to the minimum patched version. If a CVE fix requires a major version upgrade, document the affected dependency, the current version, the upgraded major version, and the breaking change risk. Verify that the project builds and all tests pass after remediation.
tasks.environmentConfiguration: Runtime environment established by the .NET 10 upgrade task.
